message:
bd-3oaig.11: add granular debug overlays for layout visualization

Replace simple debug_overlay bool with DebugOverlayFlags struct supporting
individual toggles for node bounds, edge routes, port markers, and
alignment grid. Key bindings: d=toggle all, 1-4=individual overlays.
Each overlay renders with distinct colors and a compact top-right legend.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
